title: Working with windows
description:
Working with windows

Working with windows

Epson RC+ 8.0 is an MDI (Multiple Document Interface) application.  This means that its main window can contain one or more child windows. The child windows always stay within the main window.

To get the most screen area while you are using Epson RC+ 8.0, maximize the main window by clicking on the up arrow button in the upper right corner of the main window.

To minimize a child window

Click on the down arrow button in the upper right corner of the window.  The window will change into an icon.

To open a window that has been minimized

Double click on the icon.

To maximize a child window

Click on the up arrow button in the upper right corner of the window.

To close a window

Double click on the control menu bar in the upper left corner of the window.
 Or

Select Close from the File Menu.

Switching between windows

You can activate an open window by selecting it from the Window menu.  Or you can type Ctrl+F6 to cycle through all of the open windows.

Cascading windows

Select the Cascade command from the Window menu.

Tiling windows

There are two commands for tiling windows.  Select the Tile Vertical command or the Tile Horizontal command from the Window menu to tile the child windows.
